overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxury cyberpunk apartment and exterior terrace overlooking a futuristic city at dusk. The player moves from the interior through automatic doors onto a rain-slicked balcony with neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, eventually walking toward a sunset view over distant mountains where a figure stands at the railing.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a view from a luxury apartment looking out at a cyberpunk city at dusk. The camera pans left to reveal a stylish interior with a bookshelf wall, modern seating, and dark decor, transitioning from the bright window light to dimmer interior spaces.

segments.scene_description: Moving through the apartment's dark interior, the camera passes a glitching digital screen and modern furniture, proceeding through hallways toward the automatic glass doors that lead to the exterior terrace.

segments.scene_description: Stepping out onto the wet terrace, the scene reveals a breathtaking cyberpunk cityscape with the Arasaka tower prominently lit among neon skyscrapers. The camera walks along the glass-railed terrace, passing planter boxes as it follows the building's edge.

approaching a figure standing at the terrace railing

segments.scene_description: The terrace opens toward a stunning sunset view over distant mountains, with warm backlighting replacing the neon city glow. The camera approaches and passes a figure standing at the railing, continuing along the wet reflective surface as a flying vehicle passes overhead against the colorful sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim, sophisticated interior of a luxury apartment out onto a rain-slicked terrace overlooking a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis at dusk. It begins by panning away from a bright window to reveal a dark, stylish living space featuring a bookshelf wall and modern seating. As the camera moves deeper into the interior, it passes a glitching digital screen and navigates through hallways before gliding through automatic glass doors. The scene then opens onto a wet exterior balcony, where the view expands to reveal neon-lit skyscrapers and the prominent Arasaka tower as the camera follows the glass railing past planter boxes. Finally, the neon glow shifts into the warm backlighting of a sunset over distant mountains, passing a solitary figure at the railing while a flying vehicle streaks across the colorful sky.
